page_metadata.biotools__summary: BDdb is a comprehensive database associated with birth-defect-related diseases. It consists of multi-omics datasets involving tens of common birth-defect diseases, and BDdb supplements more than 2000 biomarkers belonging to 22 types of birth defects.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BDdb is a comprehensive database associated with birth-defect-related diseases. It consists of multi-omics datasets involving tens of common birth-defect diseases, and BDdb supplements more than 2000 biomarkers belonging to 22 types of birth defects.
